name: JM Agentic Development Kit
description: 496 MOAT-grade skills for market research, brand HTML, CV enhancement, progress tracking, discovery, architecture, security and more.
author: Javier Montaño (JM Labs)

plugins.name: jm-adk
plugins.description: JM Agentic Development Kit — 496 skills across business intelligence, brand design, architecture, security, discovery and delivery. Includes market research, CV transformation, branded HTML, landing pages, progress tracking, and full project lifecycle.
highlights: 495 MOAT-grade skills with evals and reference docs
Market intelligence & competitive analysis (market-intelligence, client-dossier, client-prospecting)
Personal brand web pages & landing pages (landing-pages, html-brand, brand-voice)
Progress tracking documents with RAG dashboards (progress-tracker, project-program-management, solution-roadmap)
JM Labs brand system built-in (navy #122562 · gold #FFD700 · dark-first · bilingual ES/EN)
Architecture, security, discovery, DevOps, data — full stack coverage
